rulesVersion: Takara Tomy BEYBLADE X Regulation, 12th edition, March 2026

official3on3.duplicateRestrictedParts: The same part cannot be used more than once across the three Beys, including different colors.
official3on3.lockChipException: Custom Line Lock Chips may be repeated except Valkyrie and Emperor, which remain limited to one each.
official3on3.battleFormat: Three Beys, four points to win; order is fixed after submission.
